questionGroups.instruction: For each question, choose the correct answer.

options.label: The bicycle that's for sale was built for a child.
Some parts of the bicycle must be changed.
Debbie is selling the bike because she's too big for it now.

questions.explanation: Xe đạp cần lốp mới, tức một số bộ phận phải thay.

options.label: Tim thinks Ben should look on the concert website.
Tim hopes that Ben will be able to come with him.
Tim wants to know if Ben can pay him back today.

questions.explanation: Tim hỏi Ben có thể đưa tiền chiều nay không, tức pay him back today.

options.label: You get into the park by going this way.
It is more expensive to go here alone.
You will have fun if you come with friends.

questions.explanation: Giảm giá cho nhóm 12 người, nên đi một mình đắt hơn.

options.label: Emma knows that Lynne can't be at the party when it starts.
Emma wants to go to the party a bit later than Lynne.
Emma wants to go out with Lynne but not to the party.

questions.explanation: Emma biết Lynne làm việc đến 9, nên không thể có mặt lúc 8.

options.label: The ice cream shop is open for only 2 hours.
Two ice creams will cost the same as one.
You can get free ice creams all afternoon.

questions.explanation: Mua một tặng một, giá 2 kem bằng 1.

questions.prompt: Why did Sophie write this message?

options.label: to check if Anna has completed her homework
to let Anna know what they did in class today
to ask Anna to contact her about the homework

questions.explanation: Sophie nhờ Anna gọi lại về dự án lịch sử.

passage.label: Tasha
passage.text: Last year I wrote for my college magazine, which I found really difficult, but I don't think it's hard to write a good blog. Mine is about things from daily life that make me laugh. My older brother also has a blog, but we're writing about different subjects. We don't discuss what we're planning, but we read each other's blogs sometimes. I like giving advice to people who write in asking for it - it's good to know I've helped.

passage.label: Danni
passage.text: I started writing my popular film blog because I love movies. I like it when readers send me articles by email about a film they've seen, and I put these on my blog for everyone to read. I'm still at college, so I'm careful about spending too long on my blog, which is difficult as writing well takes time. I don't think I'll write it for much longer. I'm busy, and it's time to do something new.

passage.label: Chrissie
passage.text: I began writing on a school magazine. I stopped after a few years, but I missed it, so I started my own - I'm still writing it now! The blog's new for me, and I write about daily life. I get ideas from friends or my sister when I can't decide what to write about - we always think of something interesting, sad or serious. At first, almost nobody visited my site, but now more do, I've had some lovely comments.

questionGroups.instruction: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.prompt: Who writes both a magazine and a blog?
questions.explanation: Chrissie bắt đầu viết cho tạp chí trường và vẫn đang viết blog mới, còn Tasha đã viết tạp chí trước đây nhưng không còn.

questions.prompt: Who says that studying and writing a blog at the same time can be hard?
questions.explanation: Danni nói cô ấy vẫn học đại học và cẩn thận không dành quá nhiều thời gian cho blog, việc viết tốt tốn thời gian.

questions.prompt: Who answers questions from other people who read her blog?
questions.explanation: Tasha thích đưa lời khuyên cho những người viết thư hỏi.

questions.prompt: Who plans to stop writing her blog soon?
questions.explanation: Danni không nghĩ cô ấy sẽ viết blog lâu hơn nữa, cô ấy bận và muốn làm điều mới.

questions.prompt: Who didn't have many people reading her blog in the beginning?
questions.explanation: Chrissie nói lúc đầu hầu như không ai truy cập trang của cô ấy.

questions.prompt: Who asks a member of her family to help her write her blog?
questions.explanation: Chrissie nhờ chị gái hoặc bạn bè cho ý tưởng khi cô ấy không biết viết gì.

questions.prompt: Who says writing a blog is easier than some other types of writing?
questions.explanation: Tasha thấy viết cho tạp chí đại học rất khó nhưng không nghĩ viết blog khó.

passage.text: The women in the Watson family are all crazy about ballet. These days, Alice Watson gives ballet lessons, but for many years, she was a dancer with the National Ballet Company. Her mother, Hannah, also had a full-time job there, making costumes for the dancers.

Alice's daughter Demi started learning ballet as soon as she could walk. 'I never taught her,' says Alice, because she never let me.' Now aged sixteen, Demi is a member of the ballet company where her mother was the star dancer for many years.

Alice's husband, Jack, is an electrician. They met while he was working at a theatre where she was dancing and got married soon after. 'When Demi started dancing, the house was too small for her and Alice to practise in so I made the garage into a dance studio. Now the living room is nice and quiet when I'm watching television!' he says.

Last month, Demi was invited to dance in the ballet Swan Lake. Of course, Alice and Hannah were in the audience and even Jack was there, which made it very special for Demi. Jack says, 'I'm not that interested in ballet myself but it's fantastic seeing Demi taking her first steps with Alice's old company!' Demi was wearing a dress that Hannah made for Alice many years before.
'It was very exciting for all of us,' says Hannah. 'Demi's way of dancing is very like Alice's. I know I'm her grandmother, but I think she has a great future!'

questionGroups.instruction: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.prompt: What is Alice Watson's job now?
questions.explanation: Alice Watson gives ballet lessons, vậy cô ấy là giáo viên.

questions.prompt: Demi had her first ballet lessons
questions.explanation: Demi started learning ballet as soon as she could walk, tức từ rất nhỏ.

questions.prompt: Jack helped his wife and daughter by

options.label: letting them use the living room for dancing.
making a place for them to practise in.

questions.explanation: Jack biến gara thành phòng tập nhảy.

questions.prompt: What was the best thing about the Swan Lake show for Demi?

options.label: It was her first show with the company.
She was wearing a new dress.

questions.explanation: Có Alice, Hannah và Jack trong khán giả, điều đó rất đặc biệt với Demi.

options.label: will be a star one day.

questions.explanation: Hannah nghĩ Demi có tương lai tuyệt vời, tức sẽ thành ngôi sao.

passage.text: William Perkin was born in London in 1838. As a child he had many hobbies, including model making and photography. But it was the (19) of chemistry that really interested him. At the age of 15, he went to college to study it. While he was there, he was (20) to make a medicine from coal. This didn't go well, but when he was working on the problem, he found a cheap (21) to make the colour purple. At that (22) it was very expensive to make clothes in different colours. William knew he could make a business out of his new colour. Helped by his father and brother, William (23) his own factory to make the colour. It sold well, and soon purple clothes (24) very popular in England and the rest of the world.

questionGroups.instruction: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.explanation: môn học chemistry -> subject.
đang cố gắng tạo ra thuốc từ than -> trying.
tìm ra cách rẻ để tạo màu tím -> way.
Vào thời điểm đó, việc nhuộm màu quần áo rất đắt -> time.
mở nhà máy sản xuất màu -> opened.
quần áo màu tím trở nên phổ biến -> became.

passage.text: I hope (0) are well. I'm having a great holiday here in Thailand. Our hotel is very nice and there are a lot of good restaurants near it.

Yesterday morning, we went to (25) lovely beach. We had to leave before lunch because it was very hot. We went to a party (26) the evening in the centre (27) the town. Everyone had a good time and we got back at midnight.
Tomorrow, we want to (28) on a boat trip or (29) tennis.
I'll show you my photos (30) I get back.

questionGroups.instruction: Write one word for each gap.

questions.explanation: a lovely beach.
in the evening.
centre of the town.
go on a boat trip.
play tennis.
when I get back.
